child_heartbeat.current_step: Model allocation follow-up: no escalation needed this cycle; the bounded edit set validated cleanly.

lane_claim: Paper 7 wave8 Manager 4, Gate 5 Hilbert / Stone / Depth Limit. YOU ARE A SECTION MANAGER. Use $autonomous-orchestrator methods only; do not use Codex built-in subagents. You may launch up to six leaf workers, and workers may not spawn descendants. Implementation-enforcement mode: every worker owns exactly one Agda symbol family and must return code, targeted Agda validation, exact typed/compiler blocker, or authority escalation. No roadmap-only output. Worker lanes: FixedDepthHilbertSpaces; DepthEmbeddings; TraversalUnitary; TraversalCompatibility; quotientInnerProductWellDefinedness / FilteredColimitHilbert; StoneGenerator. Primary open blocker: promote quotientInnerProductWellDefinedness from selected finite progress to a global physical witness, then acceptedHilbertCompletionField.
